summary: Audio takes long time to start after source change
description: Switching from FM Radio to USB causes noticeable delay before music plays
root_cause: Audio buffer size was set to 1024 samples causing flush delay during source switch. Reduced to 512 samples.

summary: STR KPI failure when switching to Bluetooth audio
description: Source-to-response time exceeds 200ms threshold when changing to BT audio
root_cause: AudioMixer buffer flush taking too long. Buffer size constant was incorrect.

summary: Audio playback delayed during cold boot USB autoplay
description: When USB is connected during boot, autoplay takes too long
root_cause: Large audio buffer causing initial playback delay

summary: Bluetooth HFP call drops after 10 minutes
description: Long phone calls via Bluetooth disconnect unexpectedly
root_cause: Bluetooth ACK timeout was 800ms, some phones respond slower. Increased to 1500ms.

description: Bluetooth keeps disconnecting with specific iPhone model
root_cause: ACK response timeout too aggressive for iPhone 12 BT stack

summary: Bluetooth audio streaming cuts out intermittently
description: A2DP streaming has brief dropouts every few minutes
root_cause: Timeout values not sufficient for all phone models

summary: Boot time increased after enabling new logging
description: System boot time went from 2.8s to 4.2s after SW update
root_cause: Debug logging was accidentally enabled in release build. Each driver init had 6 extra log calls.

description: Boot time exceeds 3 second KPI
root_cause: Excessive logging during driver initialization

summary: Memory usage keeps growing during music playback
description: After hours of music playback, system becomes sluggish
root_cause: processMediaBuffer() was allocating memory but never deallocating after processing.

summary: System memory leak during video playback
description: Playing videos causes gradual memory increase
root_cause: Buffer not freed after processing

summary: Radio preset not restored after ignition cycle
description: User's saved radio preset is not restored when car restarts
root_cause: saveState() function was skipping keys containing 'Preset' due to incorrect filter logic

description: Radio frequency resets to default after power cycle
root_cause: Radio-related keys were being excluded from LUM save

summary: USB media enumeration takes too long
description: When USB stick is inserted, it takes very long to show music files
root_cause: USB enumeration had excessive sleep() calls and scanned directories sequentially

summary: Slow USB detection on large drives
description: USB drives with many files take too long to enumerate
root_cause: Sleep time scaled linearly with track count

summary: Bluetooth shows connected even after phone disconnected
description: After turning off phone Bluetooth, IVI still shows device as connected
root_cause: LUM was restoring BTConnectionState=CONNECTED from previous session without verifying actual connection

summary: BT paired device list shows wrong status
description: Bluetooth device status not synced with actual state
root_cause: Connection state persisted without validation

summary: MOST audio dropout during high traffic
description: Audio has brief dropouts when vehicle bus is busy
root_cause: Sync verification threshold was 50ms, causing false sync loss detection. Increased to 100ms.

summary: MOST ring timeout errors in logs
description: Frequent MOST sync errors visible in DLT logs
root_cause: Sync check timing too aggressive

summary: Climate temperature display shows wrong value
description: Temperature displayed on IVI doesn't match actual climate setting
root_cause: CAN checksum calculation used wrong byte order (big-endian instead of little-endian).

description: Some CAN messages fail checksum validation
root_cause: Byte order mismatch in checksum algorithm

summary: Cannot resume music after phone call ends
description: After ending a phone call, music doesn't resume automatically
root_cause: AudioFocusManager got stuck in PHONE_FOCUS state. handleFocusRelease() was waiting for confirmation that never came.

summary: Audio focus not properly released after navigation prompt
description: Navigation voice prompt blocks music from resuming
root_cause: Focus state not transitioning from RELEASING to IDLE

summary: Audio focus deadlock when multiple apps request simultaneously
description: System hangs when navigation and phone both request audio
root_cause: Focus state machine could get stuck when PHONE_FOCUS not properly released

summary: System sluggish after overnight soak test
description: After 12 hours of continuous operation, system responsiveness degrades
root_cause: Media buffer not being freed after playback. Each track added ~1MB leaked memory.

description: User preferences not restored within KPI threshold
root_cause: Sequential reads from storage instead of batch read

summary: Audio crackles when changing volume rapidly
description: Fast volume adjustment causes audio artifacts
root_cause: Volume ramp not smoothed, causing discontinuities

description: Audio balance and fade adjustments have no effect
root_cause: Gain coefficients not applied to correct channels

description: Clicking sound heard when mute button pressed
root_cause: No fade-out before mute, causing abrupt audio cutoff

description: Selected EQ preset resets after power cycle
root_cause: EQ preset key not included in LUM persistence

description: No audio on subwoofer channel
root_cause: LFE channel not routed in mixer configuration

description: Sound from rear speakers delayed compared to front
root_cause: Buffer latency different for rear channel processing

description: Bass boost setting has no audible effect
root_cause: DSP filter coefficients not updated when setting changed

summary: Audio cuts out during hard acceleration
description: Sound briefly stops when vehicle accelerates hard
root_cause: Voltage dip detection too sensitive, causing audio shutdown

description: Echo heard by caller during hands-free calls
root_cause: Acoustic echo cancellation parameters not tuned correctly

description: Turn-by-turn prompts barely audible over music
root_cause: Music ducking ratio too high, not reducing enough

description: Cannot pair with phones running Android 13
root_cause: Secure Simple Pairing protocol change in Android 13 not supported

description: Contact list from phone not appearing on IVI
root_cause: PBAP profile connection timeout too short

description: Previously paired phone does not auto-connect on ignition
root_cause: BT stack initialization delayed past auto-connect window

description: IVI connects to multiple phones at same time causing conflicts
root_cause: Connection mutex not properly enforced

description: Paired device shows as 'Unknown Device' in list
root_cause: Device name query failed but error not handled

description: High quality audio codec not selected during BT audio
root_cause: AAC codec capability not advertised correctly

description: Phone call audio plays through media speakers instead of call speakers
root_cause: SCO audio path not switched when call starts

description: Play/Pause/Skip buttons on IVI don't control phone music
root_cause: AVRCP target/controller role not properly set

description: BT connection unstable in underground parking
root_cause: TX power level set too low, increased for better range

description: SMS notifications from phone not displayed on IVI
root_cause: MAP profile event handler not registered

description: Certain USB drives not recognized by IVI
root_cause: USB descriptor parsing failed for certain drive types

description: Music from USB stops playing after few songs
root_cause: Buffer underrun when reading slow USB devices

summary: Album art not showing for USB music
description: Album artwork embedded in MP3 not displayed
root_cause: ID3v2.4 tag parsing not implemented

description: Takes long time to open folders on USB drive
root_cause: Directory listing not cached, re-read on each access

description: Shuffle mode plays same songs repeatedly
root_cause: Random seed not initialized, same sequence every boot

summary: USB audio format not supported message
description: Error shown for valid FLAC files
root_cause: FLAC decoder not initialized for high sample rates

description: Audiobook/podcast doesn't resume from last position
root_cause: Playback position not saved to LUM for long tracks

description: System crashes if USB removed during playback
root_cause: Null pointer dereference when USB disconnected mid-read

description: M3U playlist files not recognized
root_cause: M3U parser not handling Windows line endings

description: USB devices connected through hub not detected
root_cause: USB 3.0 hub descriptor handling incomplete

description: Steering wheel controls stop working intermittently
root_cause: CAN message queue overflow when bus busy

description: Vehicle speed shown incorrectly on IVI
root_cause: Speed signal scaling factor incorrect

description: Backup camera video delayed when shifting to R
root_cause: Gear signal debounce time too long

description: Parking sensor visualization not appearing
root_cause: Park sensor CAN message ID changed in new vehicle variant

description: Door open notification appears late
root_cause: CAN message priority not set correctly for safety signals

description: Fuel gauge display fluctuates randomly
root_cause: No smoothing filter on fuel level CAN signal

description: Low tire pressure warning not showing
root_cause: TPMS CAN message handler not registered

description: Tachometer shows 0 RPM
root_cause: RPM signal bit position changed in CAN database update

description: Multiple CAN error frames logged during boot
root_cause: CAN controller initialized before bus powered

description: Outside temperature displayed incorrectly
root_cause: Temperature offset not applied (-40 degree baseline)

description: Audio over MOST not working after boot
root_cause: MOST network on timing sequence incorrect

description: External amplifier not found on MOST network
root_cause: Node address scan range too limited

description: High-res audio streaming fails
root_cause: Synchronous channel allocation insufficient for 96kHz audio

description: System doesn't recover from MOST cable disconnect
root_cause: Ring break interrupt handler not calling recovery routine

description: Multiple MOST timing masters causing audio glitches
root_cause: Timing master arbitration logic incorrect

description: No splash image during boot
root_cause: Display driver initialized after splash timeout

description: IVI doesn't boot at -20 degree C
root_cause: Clock stabilization timeout too short for cold conditions

description: System resets during driver loading
root_cause: Watchdog not fed during long driver init sequence

description: Media service starts before audio service ready
root_cause: Service dependency graph not followed

description: Default settings used instead of saved config
root_cause: Config file path incorrect after filesystem remount

description: Boot animation plays with frame drops
root_cause: Animation rendering competing with driver loading

description: Hardware buttons not working after boot
root_cause: I2C bus not ready when GPIO expander accessed

summary: RTC time lost after battery disconnect
description: Clock resets to default after battery service
root_cause: RTC backup domain not properly configured

description: Cannot enter diagnostic boot mode
root_cause: Boot mode flag not checked early enough in boot sequence

description: Cannot boot into recovery mode
root_cause: Recovery partition mount point changed

summary: Radio audio clipping at high volume
description: Distortion heard when FM radio volume above 80%
root_cause: Digital gain applied before limiter causing overflow

description: Digital radio shows no stations after scan
root_cause: DAB ensemble parsing failed for certain multiplex configurations

description: AM stations have excessive noise
root_cause: AGC parameters not optimized for AM band

description: Radio text and station name don't change
root_cause: RDS decoder thread blocked on mutex

description: Auto-seek doesn't stop on some radio stations
root_cause: Signal strength threshold too high for weak stations

description: Vehicle WiFi hotspot doesn't turn on
root_cause: AP mode not supported on driver firmware version

description: Internet connection drops every few minutes
root_cause: Power save mode being activated inappropriately

description: Only 2.4GHz networks visible
root_cause: 5GHz band disabled in regulatory domain settings

description: Certain parts of screen don't respond to touch
root_cause: Touch calibration data corrupted

description: Auto brightness not responding to ambient light
root_cause: Light sensor I2C address wrong in device tree

description: Display doesn't dim when headlights turn on
root_cause: Headlight signal CAN message not being monitored

summary: Voice recognition fails in noisy environment
description: Voice commands not recognized when driving
root_cause: Noise suppression threshold too low

description: Long delay before Siri responds to button press
root_cause: BT HID profile reconnection slow

description: Hey Google command ignored
root_cause: Wake word detection disabled after BT reconnect

description: Route takes 30+ seconds to calculate
root_cause: Route algorithm not using map tile cache

description: Vehicle position shown wrong on map
root_cause: GPS antenna gain settings incorrect

description: Real-time traffic information stale
root_cause: Traffic feed connection not refreshing

description: Software update always fails near completion
root_cause: Verification step timeout too short for large packages

description: User preferences lost after OTA
root_cause: User data partition not preserved during update
